description: Legal document related to remission of debts. Location: Fustat. Dating: 966–1011 CE. The legal parties mentioned in the document include: Saʿa[dya], Yishmaʿel, Salāma and Yefet. The attestation section mentions Natan b. Menashshe, [Shemuʾe]l b. Yaʿaqov, Munīr b. [...]. The document is signed by Shemarya ha-Rav [b. Elḥanan ha-Rav], who served as the head of the Babylonian community in Fustat. (Information from FGP). MCD.
tags: cmp, legal, Shemarya b. Elhanan, 10th or 11th c
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
